sources.excerpt: Akeno Sushi Bar & Thai lists Annandale, Capitol Hill, and Old Town locations; Annandale is 6550 Little River Turnpike Unit F, Alexandria, VA 22312.
rowIdentifiers: 6550 Little River Turnpike Unit F, Alexandria, VA 22312
notes: The command-line capture was Cloudflare-blocked; the official page's web-accessible representation was reviewed. HTTP 403 describes the direct capture attempt, not the reviewed representation.

sources.excerpt: The current Annandale menu representation contains 235 presentations across 28 categories. It supplies selected item descriptions but no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact policy.
notes: Authority remains restaurant_linked_vendor because this is the restaurant-linked ordering-menu representation; it is not promoted to a restaurant-issued allergen guide.
The command-line capture was Cloudflare-blocked; stable current category and item anchors support reproduction through the web-accessible representation.
